add_namespace = sample

country_event = {
    id = sample.1
    title = sample.1.t
    immediate = {
        news_event = sample.2
    }
    option = {
        name = sample.1.a
    }
}

news_event = {
    id = sample.2
    title = sample.2.t
    is_triggered_only = yes
    immediate = { }
    option = {
        name = sample.2.a
    }
}
